summary: P0 Bug Fix VERIFIED: X/Z reports now return non-zero sales data. All 6 backend tests passed. The fix added robust multi-strategy bill filtering with fallbacks for old data without business_date/paid_by_id fields.
passed_tests: test_01_admin_session_x_report_returns_non_zero_sales - Admin X Report: RD$ 1,696.40 total (2 invoices)
test_02_luis_session_x_report_returns_non_zero_sales - Luis X Report: RD$ 782.76 total (2 invoices)
test_04_current_business_day_returns_non_zero_total_sales - Current Day Stats: RD$ 1,696.40 total (2 invoices)
test_05_print_report_shift_creates_job - Print report-shift endpoint processes X report correctly
test_06_verify_bills_data_structure - Bills data analysis: 193 paid bills, 166 without business_date (old data handled)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_x_z_reports_zero_sales_bug.py - Created test file for P0 bug fix verification

bug_fix_verification.issue: X/Z reports showing $0.00 for all sales values instead of actual sales data
root_cause: Old bills didn't have 'business_date' or 'paid_by_id' fields (only 'cashier_id')
X report was incorrectly looking for 'opened_by_id' in Supabase sessions (field is 'opened_by')
No fallback logic for matching bills without new fields
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Multi-strategy bill filtering with fallbacks in /app/backend/routers/business_days.py
fix_strategies: Strategy 3: Fallback to time range (opened_at to closed_at)
User matching: Uses $or to match paid_by_id OR cashier_id for backwards compatibility

print_report_shift.status: PASS - Endpoint processes X report data correctly

data_analysis.note: Fix correctly handles 166 old bills without business_date field using fallback strategies

seed_data_creation: No new seed data - tests used existing session and business day IDs provided
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified. X/Z reports now correctly show sales data. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_x_z_reports_zero_sales_bug.py can be used for regression testing. The fix handles backwards compatibility for 166 old bills that don't have business_date field.
